title: Add M2 Worker headless parity
summary: Prove browser Worker and Node headless run the M2 work/logistics scenario with matching authoritative hashes and read-only projections.
acceptance: Browser Worker and Node headless consume the same M2 command stream and produce matching authoritative hashes
Read models and snapshots remain read-only projections and cannot mutate world state
Worker parity diagnostics include seed scenario checkpoint hash mismatch tick snapshot size and latency metrics
Existing M1 worker-smoke coverage remains intact
No UI or Electron layer becomes authoritative

history.details: Created by WM-0032 M2 planning DAG; remains proposed until dependencies are done.

objective: Gate M2 through Worker/headless authoritative parity while keeping UI read-only.
forbiddenPaths: Worker protocol redesign without WM-0034 follow-up approval
benchmarkImpact: Records Worker latency, snapshot size and parity overhead for M2, but baseline updates wait for WM-0042.
reviewRouting: Owner completes to reviewer; client-engineer may inspect read-model usage but cannot own simulation authority.
rollbackModel: Revert M2 parity additions and keep M1 Worker smoke intact.
ownerGate: Prove authoritative hash parity rather than UI visual parity
Run every required check before taskctl complete

sparkEligibility.reason: Worker parity and authority boundaries are not suitable for Spark.
